name: Auth Router
description: FastAPI authentication router implementing GitHub OAuth flow with JWT session management. Handles login redirect, OAuth callback with user creation/update, logout, and current user retrieval.

functions.name: create_jwt
functions.description: Creates a JWT token for a user with subject, expiration, and issued-at claims

inputs.name: user_id
inputs.description: User UUID to encode in the token subject

postconditions: Returns valid JWT string encoded with HS256 or configured algorithm
Token contains 'sub' claim with stringified user_id
Token contains 'exp' claim set to current UTC time + jwt_expiry_days
Token contains 'iat' claim set to current UTC time

functions.name: decode_jwt
functions.description: Decodes and validates a JWT token, returning the payload dictionary

error_cases.name: InvalidTokenError
error_cases.condition: Token signature is invalid or algorithm mismatch

error_cases.name: ExpiredSignatureError
error_cases.condition: Token exp claim is in the past

error_cases.name: DecodeError
error_cases.condition: Token is malformed or cannot be decoded

postconditions: Returns decoded payload dictionary if token is valid and not expired

functions.name: get_current_user
functions.description: Placeholder dependency function that always raises 401 HTTPException. Intended to be overridden in main.py with real cookie-based authentication logic.

functions.name: login
functions.description: GET /api/auth/login endpoint that redirects to GitHub OAuth authorization page with client_id and scopes
postconditions: Returns RedirectResponse to GitHub authorize URL
Redirect URL includes client_id and scope parameters (read:user user:email)

functions.name: callback
functions.description: GET /api/auth/callback endpoint handling GitHub OAuth callback. Exchanges code for access token, fetches GitHub user profile, creates or updates local User record, generates JWT, and redirects to frontend dashboard with session cookie.

error_cases.name: OAuthFailed
error_cases.condition: GitHub token endpoint does not return access_token

error_cases.name: MissingGitHubId
error_cases.condition: GitHub user response does not contain 'id' field

error_cases.name: NetworkError
error_cases.condition: httpx request fails (timeout, connection error, etc.)

postconditions: User record exists in database with GitHub profile data
Response includes httponly secure session cookie with JWT token
side_effects: Database INSERT if user does not exist
Database UPDATE of avatar_url, display_name, email if user exists

structured_side_effects.description: POST to exchange OAuth code for access token
GET to fetch authenticated user profile
INSERT new user or UPDATE existing user fields

functions.name: logout
functions.description: POST /api/auth/logout endpoint that deletes the session cookie and returns 204 No Content
postconditions: Session cookie is deleted from response

functions.name: me
functions.description: GET /api/auth/me endpoint that returns current authenticated user's profile information
postconditions: Returns dictionary with id (stringified UUID), username, display_name, avatar_url, bio

invariants: JWT tokens use algorithm from settings.jwt_algorithm
JWT tokens expire after settings.jwt_expiry_days days
Session cookies are httponly=True, secure=True, samesite='lax'

data_access.rationale: Queries User table by github_id in callback endpoint. Creates new User records or updates existing records (avatar_url, display_name, email) during OAuth flow.

side_effects.rationale: SELECT User WHERE github_id = ? to find existing user
INSERT new user or UPDATE avatar_url, display_name, email on existing user

authority.rationale: Owns the GitHub OAuth authentication flow, JWT creation/validation, and session management for the application
